info.title: Diabetes 360 API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Diabetes 360 health management application

data.description: Error response data - null for most errors, empty array [] for array endpoints

profileComplete.description: Indicates if the user profile is complete (for customer role)

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

tags.name: Health Metrics
tags.description: Health metrics tracking and management endpoints

get.summary: Get all users (Admin only)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return

customerData.description: Optional for customer role. At least diabetesType is required.

birthDay.description: Optional - defaults to '01' if not provided

birthMonth.description: Optional - defaults to '01' if not provided

birthYear.description: Optional - defaults to current year if not provided

diagnosisDay.description: Optional - defaults to '01' if not provided

diagnosisMonth.description: Optional - defaults to '01' if not provided

diagnosisYear.description: Optional - defaults to current year if not provided

weight.description: Optional - defaults to '70' if not provided

height.description: Optional - defaults to '170' if not provided

get.summary: Get user by ID (Admin only)

customerData.description: Included if user role is customer and customer data exists

post.summary: Authenticate user and get access tokens
Refresh access token using refresh token

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or expired refresh token

post.summary: Logout user and invalidate refresh token

400.description: Bad request - invalid token or validation error

404.description: Reset token not found or expired

get.summary: Get all available slot sizes
Get all available slot types
Get all availability dates for the authenticated physician

post.summary: Create an availability date for the authenticated physician

get.summary: Get dates with availability for a physician
Get slots for a physician on a specific date
Get available (unbooked) slots for a physician on a specific date

delete.summary: Delete a slot (physician only, cannot delete booked slots)

patch.summary: Update slot price (physician or admin, cannot update booked slots)

get.summary: Get customer profile data

400.description: Invalid data or profile already completed

post.summary: Add a new health metric entry

schema.description: userId is automatically extracted from the authenticated user's token

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM). Only available for paid users.

400.description: Bad request - validation error, limit exceeded, or heart rate feature requires paid tier

get.summary: Get the latest health metric for the current user
Get paginated health metrics for the current user

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of metrics to return

data.description: Array of health metrics, empty array returned on error

get.summary: Get health metrics for chart visualization

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of data to retrieve

get.summary: Get today's metric count(s) for the current user

parameters.name: metricType
parameters.description: Optional - Get count for specific metric type. If omitted, returns counts for all types.

oneOf.description: When metricType query param is provided
When metricType query param is omitted

get.summary: Get aggregated health statistics (daily, weekly, monthly averages)

daily.description: Daily average blood sugar in mg/dL

weekly.description: Weekly average blood sugar in mg/dL

monthly.description: Monthly average blood sugar in mg/dL

daily.description: Daily average water intake in liters

weekly.description: Weekly average water intake in liters

monthly.description: Monthly average water intake in liters

get.summary: Get filtered health metrics by date range and metric types

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: JSON array string of metric types to filter. Can be passed as JSON string or single value. Valid values are blood_sugar, water_intake, steps, and heart_beat. If not provided, all types are returned.

get.summary: Get all active specialties for consultation
Get all physicians for consultation
Get physicians by specialty for consultation
Get physician rating

physicianId.description: ID of the physician being rated

get.summary: Get all specialties (Admin only)
Get specialty by ID (Admin only)
Get physician data by user ID (Admin only)

image.description: Image file to upload (max 5MB, allowed types jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp)

400.description: Invalid file or file too large

get.summary: Get free tier limits configuration
get.description: Returns the current free tier limits for glucose, steps, and water intake metrics

post.description: Create new free tier limits. Will fail if limits already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

400.description: Bad request - validation error or limits already exist

put.summary: Create or update free tier limits (Admin only)
put.description: Upsert operation - creates limits if they don't exist, or updates if they do

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

patch.summary: Partially update free tier limits (Admin only)
patch.description: Update only specified limit fields. Limits must already exist.

glucoseLimit.description: Maximum number of glucose logs per day for free tier users

stepsLimit.description: Maximum number of steps logs per day for free tier users

waterLimit.description: Maximum number of water intake logs per day for free tier users

get.summary: Get current user's profile
